title: Worker-side (CPS)
body: Hours, transitions, and NILF by frozen AI-relevance terciles.

title: Business-side (BTOS)
body: National AI-use trends and supplement workforce shares.

title: Structure and macro
body: OEWS/O*NET tasks; JOLTS/CES sector context. Not worker-firm linked.

title: Missing integrated object
body: No public source jointly observes occupation, firm AI adoption, and worker outcomes.

title: CPS: AI-at-work module
body: Short module on job-level AI use without over-claiming quality.

title: BTOS plus ABS
body: Keep BTOS comparable; ABS as annual business structure anchor.

title: JOLTS pilot
body: Coarse occupation-aware demand context; not full occ resolution.

title: Linked administrative data
body: Restricted linkage for integrated worker-firm observation.
